name: Weapon Mixer
effect: Your hero gets +5 for every different weapon type revealed this game.

name: Contract Limitations
effect: Your hero gets +15 but you don't draw a play at the start of next battle.

name: Unified Front
effect: Your hero gets +15. If all of your currently revealed heroes have the same weapon type, this play costs 0.

name: Frosty Times
effect: For the next 3 battles, if you have a hero with an Ice weapon in the active battle, it gets +10.

name: Should Have Tried Harder
effect: Only run this play if your opponent has honors. If your opponent has not run any plays this battle, their hero gets -10.

name: 10 For A Sub
effect: If you substituted this battle, your hero gets +10.

name: Hollow Bat
effect: Roll a dice. If it lands on 3-6, your hero gets +25. If it lands on 1 or 2, your hero gets -25.

name: Weapon Lineage
effect: Your current hero gets +10 for every hero in your discard pile with the same weapon type.

name: Steel Smash
effect: If your hero has a Steel weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your hero gets +20.

name: Target Acquired
effect: Name a weapon type. Opponent's hero in the next battle loses -15 if it has that type.

name: Flip Ya For 2 Plays
effect: Flip a coin: if heads, you draw 2 plays. If tails, your opponent draws 2 plays.

name: Hot Dog Flip Out
effect: Flip a coin 3 times. For each heads, your hero gets +5. For each tails, lose 1 hot dog.

name: Power Pick
effect: Reveal the top 3 plays of your playbook. Add 1 to your hand and discard the rest. If it's a play with a cost of 3 or higher, your hero gets +10.

name: Win The Toss
effect: Flip a coin: if heads, run the top play from your playbook in this battle for free (0 hot dog cost).

name: Protein Bar
effect: Your hero gets +15. If you lose this battle, recover 1 hot dog.

name: Late Hit
effect: This must be used in Battle 7. Your opponent's hero gets -35.

name: To Fight Another Day
effect: If you lost the previous battle, your hero in the active battle gets +20.

name: Buff Or Debuff
effect: After paying this play's cost, if your opponent has more hot dogs than you, your hero gets +15. If you have more than them, their hero gets -15.

name: Flaming Flip
effect: Discard a hero with a Fire weapon from your hand and flip a coin. If it's heads, your hero gets +20.

name: Icevantage
effect: If your opponent's hero has an Ice weapon, your hero gets +15.

name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose
effect: Flip a coin: if heads, your hero gets +15. If tails, your opponent's hero loses -5.

name: Lucky 7
effect: Roll a die two times; if the numbers add up to 7, your hero gets +100; if any other number, you must discard a random hero from your hand.

name: Indestructible
effect: This hero can't have its power reduced by an opponent's play.

name: Frontload
effect: If your hero in the next battle has a Steel weapon, it gets +15.

name: Over Under
effect: Send 2 heroes from your hand to your discard pile. Draw 1 play and 1 hero.

name: Forced Retreat
effect: Your opponent must discard their current hero, and replace it with one from their hand.

name: High Stakes Pump-Up
effect: Your hero gets +10. If you lose this battle, your hero in the next battle gets -20.

name: Pre-Game Ritual
effect: Flip a coin 3 times; your hero gets +15 if the coin lands on heads 2 or more times.

name: Dead Red
effect: Name a weapon type. Now and for the rest of the game, if your opponent's hero has that weapon type, they get -10. Otherwise, you discard 1 play.

name: Substitution Boost
effect: For the rest of the game, any hero that has been substituted in gets +5.

name: Stain-less-Steel
effect: If your opponent's hero has a Steel weapon, give it -15.

name: Prevent D
effect: Your opponent can't run any plays in Battle 7.

name: Pass The Flame
effect: If your hero has a Fire weapon, your next hero gets +10.

name: Chrome Will
effect: If your hero has a Steel weapon, it can't drop below its current power.

name: Tiebreaker Takedown
effect: If both players have the same number of hot dogs before you used this play, your opponent's hero gets -20. If not, they get -10.

name: Radiant Comeback
effect: Swap your hero with a Glow weapon hero in your discard pile.

name: Fairweather Fan
effect: Play this in Battle 5 or later. Your hero gets +5 for each battle you've won.

name: Double Down
effect: Flip a coin twice. If it lands on heads both times, your hero gets +20. If both flips are tails, your hero loses -40. (Nothing happens for any other result.)

name: Jump Ball
effect: Flip a coin: if heads, your hero gets +10. If tails, your hero gets -10.

name: Fire Hose
effect: If your opponent's hero has a Fire weapon, your hero gets +15.

name: Ice Blast
effect: If your hero has an Ice weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your hero gets +20.

name: One-and-One
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your hero gets +10. You may do this a second and final time if it lands on heads.

name: Discard Rebate
effect: Shuffle a hero from your discard pile back into your hero deck.

name: Burn The Timeline
effect: Discard a hero with a Fire weapon from your hand. If you do, cancel all plays that affect the rest of the game.

name: Forced Substitution
effect: Your opponent must pay 2 hot dogs and substitute next battle.

name: Crystal Ball
effect: Pick a number 1-6. Then your opponent picks a different number 1-6; roll a die; if it lands on either player's number, their hero gets +30.

name: Bad Chemistry
effect: If your opponent's last 2 revealed heroes have different weapon types, your hero gets +15 and you draw 1 play.

name: Revoke The Future
effect: Choose one play your opponent has run that affects the rest of the game and cancel it. Your opponent's hero in the active battle gets -15.
